name: VPM4001
description: VPM4001 is an allogeneic vaccine for treatment of prostate carcinoma. It consists of irradiated human LNCaP cells that have been genetically modified to permanently secrete interferon-γ and interleukin-2 (LNCaP/IL-2/IFN-γ). Interferon-γ enhances presentation of tumour antigens, whereas interleukin-2 stimulates T cells.
indication: Investigated for use/treatment in prostate cancer.
